title: DeathAnnouncer
description: DeathAnnouncer: Complete death message control, from simple to sophisticated.
body:
DeathAnnouncer

DeathAnnouncer is the definitive death messages plugin for modern Minecraft servers. Featuring updated visuals, lightning-fast performance, complete network support (BungeeCord & Velocity), and deep Discord integration, it turns ordinary deaths into epic, immersive moments — keeping both your players and community engaged at all times.
--- # Key Features ### Visuals and Player Experience - Fully customizable death messages that can be tailored to match your server's unique identity and style. - Modern text engine with native support for Hex Colors, Gradients, and MiniMessage. - Interactive messages supporting hover events and click actions, such as running commands or displaying statistics and information. - Customizable sound effects to make every death more immersive and impactful. ### Network and Integrations - Global death broadcasts with seamless synchronization across Velocity or BungeeCord networks. - Discord Webhook integration for sending detailed and elegant death logs with rich embeds, custom username, and avatar. - Full PlaceholderAPI support, enabling the use of player statistics, levels, clan tags, and custom placeholders in death messages. ### Control and Advanced Systems - Built-in Death Logs and Auditing system, allowing administrators to review complete death history directly in-game. - World whitelist system to enable or disable the plugin per world or dimension. - Advanced item detection that automatically identifies custom item names, enchantments, and attributes of the killer’s weapon. - Integrated localization with native support for: - English - Portuguese (PT-BR) - Italian - Spanish ### ... and more! DeathAnnouncer is continuously updated with new features, performance improvements, and expanded customization options to meet the demands of professional Minecraft servers worldwide. ## Available Placeholders - `{player}` – Player name - `{uuid}` – Player UUID - `{killer}` – Killer name - `{cause}` – Death cause - `{world}` – World where the player died - `{biome}` – Biome of the death location - `{ping}` – Player ping *(Plus full PlaceholderAPI support)* ## Discord Webhook Integration Keep your Discord community active with elegant and detailed combat logs. All message content, fields, and appearance can be fully customized directly in the configuration file. ![WebHook](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f83d8f6b3f4df4516d344e9c483c8c0a4a7f978_0.webp) ### Configuration Example ```yaml discord: enabled: true webhook: url: "YOUR_WEBHOOK_URL" username: "DeathAnnouncer" avatar-url: "" message: use-embed: true content: "" embed: title: "Combat Log" color: "#e63946" description: "{message}" thumbnail: "https://mc-heads.net/avatar/{player}" footer: text: "DeathAnnouncer - Plugin on Modrinth" icon: "" fields: player: name: "Player" value: "{player}" inline: true cause: name: "Cause" value: "{cause}" inline: true killer: name: "Killer" value: "{killer}" inline: false ``` --- ## DeathAnnouncer in Action! [](https://modrinth.com/plugin/deathannouncer/gallery) --- ## Version compatibility DeathAnnouncer is compatible with Folia, Spigot, Paper (and its forks), as well as Velocity and BungeeCord proxies, supporting all versions from 1.20+. --- ### Support & Community Need help, found a bug, or want to suggest a feature? [](https://discord.gg/fvj5xmWafE)[](https://plugin-labs.gitbook.io/deathannouncer)
